description: Minutes of court proceedings, recto dated Kislev 1454 sel. (December 1142), written and signed by Natan b. Shemuel. Verso a different recording, related to the same people, wrtiten the next year - "in one of the months of the year 1455" (Sel., which is 22.9.1142-11.9.1143). Written and signed by Natan ha-Kohen b. Shelomo.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
